_comment: MT-113 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: append-only versioned identity profiles per character. Pure JSON, no SQLite. reference_ref_slug / source_ref_slug / artifact_ref are made run-unique by the loader. provenance may carry a secret-looking line; the store redacts it before persistence, so the loader asserts the redacted form round-trips (raw secrets never stored). seq is computed by the store (1-based, append-only per character).

profiles.name: Primary Face Identity
profiles.description: Front-facing portrait identity profile for the pose subject.
profiles.provenance_clean: captured from operator portrait inbox; lineage v1

profiles.name: Wardrobe Reference Identity
profiles.description: Full-body wardrobe reference for the pose subject.

profiles.name: Secondary Face Identity
profiles.description: Three-quarter angle face identity profile (later version).
